metadata.description: estimatr::iv_robust weighted 2SLS parity fixture for HAD Phase 4.5 B
metadata.notes: HC1 (se_type='HC1') and CR1 (se_type='stata') under pweights match Python's _fit_mass_point_2sls bit-exactly at atol=1e-10. Classical (se_type='classical') uses estimatr's projection-form DOF convention (n-k + X_hat'WX_hat bread) which differs from Python's sandwich form (sum(w)-k + Z'W^2Z meat); included as a reference without parity assertion.
